code: const CHANNEL_NAME='Very Direct';export function formatRelativeTime(dateStr){const diff=Date.now()-new Date(dateStr).getTime();const minutes=Math.floor(diff/60000);const hours=Math.floor(diff/3600000);const days=Math.floor(diff/86400000);const weeks=Math.floor(days/7);const months=Math.floor(days/30);const years=Math.floor(days/365);if(minutes<60)return"".concat(Math.max(1,minutes)," minute").concat(minutes!==1?'s':''," ago");if(hours<24)return"".concat(hours," hour").concat(hours!==1?'s':''," ago");if(days<7)return"".concat(days," day").concat(days!==1?'s':''," ago");if(weeks<5)return"".concat(weeks," week").concat(weeks!==1?'s':''," ago");if(months<12)return"".concat(months," month").concat(months!==1?'s':''," ago");return"".concat(years," year").concat(years!==1?'s':''," ago");}export function formatCount(num){const n=num||0;if(n>=1000000)return"".concat((n/1000000).toFixed(1),"M");if(n>=1000)return"".concat((n/1000).toFixed(1),"K");return String(n);}export function formatViews(count){return"".concat(formatCount(count)," view").concat(count===1?'':'s');}export function formatLikes(count){return formatCount(count);}export function formatDuration(seconds){if(!seconds)return null;const m=Math.floor(seconds/60);const s=seconds%60;return"".concat(m,":").concat(s.toString().padStart(2,'0'));}export{CHANNEL_NAME};
